hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); sys.stdout.write(re.sub(r'^[hH]:/Crawler/?','',fp.replace(chr(92),'/')))" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && git add "$f" && git commit -m "auto: $f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
